title: メジロという名の物語

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During summer camp, the Mejiro family gathers
to hold a conference on how to defeat Silence
Suzuka at the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ultimately, with Mejiro Bright's help, they find an
answer. They can use the bonds between the
Mejiros to fight back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Each Mejiro trains Mejiro Bright passionately and
determinedly with their own unique skills.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Mejiro Bright inherits the skills that are
woven throughout the inextricable tapestry of her
family's history.
